titleStmt.title: SII 23.368: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 368. (A.R. No. 368 of 1907.) Āḍuturai, Papanasam Taluk, Tanjavur District Āpatsahāyēśvara temple—on the same wall Rājarāja (II): year 16

summary.p: This is possibly an inscription of Rājarāja II, in which case the date would be 1161-62 A.D. It is damaged and seems to register a sale of 7 mā of land belonging to the temple to one••••••••• koṇḍaśōḻa-Pallavaraiyan. The Śivabrāhmaṇas who received the amount from the purchaser agreed to measure out 3 kalam and odd of paddy every year to the temple. The purchaser is said to have improved the land by digging a well therein and to have agreed to certain obligations to fulfil to the temple, which are lost in the damaged portion of the record. Suṅgaṉtavirttaśōḻa-Pērāṟu is referred to as the northern boundary of the land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanacakravattikaḷ śrīrājarā
ja devarkku yāṇṭu 10 6Āvatu Uyyak
koṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭu tiraimurnāṭṭu Uṭai
yār tirukkuraṅkāṭutuṟai Uṭaiya
ḷaṅkuṭaiyāṉ veḷāṉ vacca naṟ koṇ
ṭacoḻappallavaraiyanukku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta ni
la kāṭutuṟaiyil cuṅkattavirttaco
ḻapperāṟṟukku teṉkaraippa ṭṭa nilattukkuk kiḻ
pāṟkellai Ittevar tevatāṉa nilattukku meṟku
vaṭakkum me
lpāṟkellai teṟku nokkippoṉa vaḻikku kiḻak
kum vaṭapāṟkellai cuṅkaṉtavirttacoḻap perāṟṟu
kkut teṟkum Āka Ivvicaitta perunāṉkellaiyu
ḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Eḻumāvum kuḷaṅkalli tāna
dharmmam ceyyakkaṭavanāka viṟṟukkuṭu
mutal ceṉṟu varukiṟa ḷa kkum pon
koṇṭu poliūṭṭāka Oṭukkiṉa kācu 2 10 Ikkācu
Irupatum Ikkoyiṟ civabrāhmaṇarom nā
kaikkoṇṭu kāciṉvāyt tiṅkaḷ Araikkāl ciṉ
ṉappalicai polivatākavum poliṉta palicai
kkum Iṉnel mukkalane tūṇippatakkum Āṭṭā
ṇṭutoṟum Aḷakkakkaṭavomāka Ikkācu Iru
patuṅ kaikkoṇṭu candrādityavat Iṉnel
kkakkaṭavomāka kalveṭṭik kuṭuttōm Ikko
yil civabrāhmaṇarom ..itu paṉmāheśvara
rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 23.368 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
